form.formComment: Meets The Art Of Success again; when 25 metres fifth at this track over 1790m in a NR 49 to 53 race on April 7. Facing a difficult assignment.

formComments.comment: Meets The Art Of Success again; when 25 metres fifth at this track over 1790m in a NR 49 to 53 race on April 7. Facing a difficult assignment.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin.
Tired to be beaten 64m into 7th placing.
Raced three wide without cover from the 850m mark.
Slow to begin.

form.formComment: Improved last start with a game effort when 2nd (Fr3) over 1790m after showing early speed at this track was leading by 1.6 at the bell, beaten 9 m by The Art Of Success (2:11.10) in NR 49 to 53 on April 7 at $34. Draws for a good showing.

form.formComment: Going well. Last start by 1.4 m (Fr1) at this track (2:13.50) beating Always On Safari in NR 49 to 53 on April 7 at $6 at the bell was leading 0.8. Capable of going well again.
